article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures and his release of the Noizekid Sample Pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has established a notable presence in the music industry through collaborations with prominent artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has contributed to the music community by releasing the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, which have been utilized in various of his productions.
His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, indicating a shared influence within the electronic music scene.
While specific tracks and recent releases are not indexed, Noizekid's contributions to moombahton and dancehall continue to shape the sound of contemporary electronic music.
